projectDescription: A self-hosted Java server that lets Xbox, Switch, and PlayStation players join any Minecraft Bedrock Edition server IP using DNS redirection.
keyFeatures: DNS-based redirect for featured Minecraft servers on Xbox, Switch, and PlayStation
In-game server list UI for adding and managing custom server entries
Supports running as a standalone JAR or Docker container
Configurable via startup args, config.yml file, or environment variables
Optional database backend (MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL) for persistent player data
Custom server list via JSON file with server groups support
MOTD (message of the day) support with cooldown options
bind9 DNS integration scripts for Linux and Docker
publicApiSurface: config.yml (port, bind_ip, server_limit, db_type, db_host, db_db, db_user, db_pass, custom_servers, whitelist, language, motd, online_mode, kick_inactive, user_servers, featured_servers, fetch_featured_ips, debug, packet_limit, global_packet_limit)
custom_servers JSON format: [{name, iconUrl, address, port}] or [{name, iconUrl, content: [...]}]
Console commands: stop, end, reload motd [file]
